ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the file belongs to */,
  "loc" INTEGER /* Lines of code in the file */,
  "loc_touched" INTEGER /* Lines of code touched in the file */,
  "revisions" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the file */,
  "fix_count" INTEGER /* Number of fixes made to the file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the file is stored in */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path of the file within the repository */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .java, .py) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "release_number" INTEGER /* Number of the release */,
  "release_length" INTEGER /* Length of the release */,
  "weighted_release_length" REAL /* Weighted length of the release */,
  "measured_outcome" TEXT /* Measured outcome of the release */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the release belongs to */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the release is made in */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes or descriptions about the release */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Status of the release (e.g., planned, in progress, released, deprecated) */,
  "total_files" INTEGER /* Total number of files in the release */,
  "total_authors" INTEGER /* Total number of authors who contributed to the release */,
  "total_loc" INTEGER /* Total lines of code in the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the author is associated with */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the author is active in */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the author joined the project */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Last date of activity by the author */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the author is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_authors" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "loc_added" INTEGER /* Lines of code added by the author */,
  "max_loc_added" INTEGER /* Maximum lines of code added by the author */,
  "average_loc_added" REAL /* Average lines of code added by the author */,
  "churn" INTEGER /* Churn (lines of code changed) by the author */,
  "max_churn" INTEGER /* Maximum churn by the author */,
  "average_churn" REAL /* Average churn by the author */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of the commit (e.g., fix, feature, refactor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_sets" (
  "change_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change set */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the change set belongs to */,
  "change_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the change set */,
  "max_change_set_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size of the change set */,
  "average_change_set_size" REAL /* Average size of the change set */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of the commit (e.g., fix, feature, refactor) */,
  "total_loc_changed" INTEGER /* Total lines of code changed in the change set */,
  "total_files_changed" INTEGER /* Total number of files changed in the change set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_sets_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is associated with */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository the user has access to */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date of login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is currently active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
